title: Body Slide (Text + Visual)
description: Split layout with text on one side and a visual (chart, image, diagram) on the other

sections.headline: Slide headline — conclusion-oriented, same rules as body-full.
sections.textSide: Left or right column with bullet points, key takeaways, or narrative text. Max 4 bullets or 100 words.
sections.visualSide: Chart, diagram, screenshot, or illustration. Describe the visual content and its data if it's a chart.

qualityRules: Text and visual must reinforce the same message — don't show unrelated content
Text side: max 4 bullets or 100 words (less than body-full since space is split)
Visual side should be the primary focus — text supports the visual, not the other way around

Charts rotate through semantic palette tokens (--zen-color-primary-500, --zen-color-success-500, --zen-color-warning-500, --zen-color-error-500, --zen-color-annotation-annotation, --zen-color-neutral-600), never hardcoded colors
Split is typically 40/60 or 50/50 — visual side gets equal or more space
All text uses Roboto font family
